name: Angelina Ajimu (Arknights)
description: Angelina Ajimu, a resilient transporter turned Rhodes Island Operator, possesses a unique affinity for Arts, skillfully manipulating object weights. Despite her Oripathy and a hidden love for older music, she embraces hope, works tirelessly, and seeks a brighter future, ready to embark on a path filled with possibilities.
creator: Skadi'sHusband648
